summary: Completed frontend testing of Relatórios page UX restructuring. All 7 requested features verified and working correctly. No functional regressions detected.

feature_1_3_zone_structure.details: 3 visual zones clearly defined: 'ZONA DE SELEÇÃO', 'ZONA DE FILTROS', 'ZONA DE RESULTADOS' with consistent uppercase styling

feature_2_horizontal_radio_navigation.details: st.radio with horizontal=True renders 'Garanhão | Proprietário | Histórico Geral' navigation compactly

feature_3_collapsed_filters_by_default.details: st.expander('Filtros de análise', expanded=False) - verified content not visible until clicked, expands correctly on click

feature_4_export_at_top_of_results.details: CSV and PDF buttons positioned at top right of results zone, both clickable

feature_5_compact_kpi_indicators.details: 5 KPI items with 'reports-kpi-item' class styling - compact technical display confirmed

feature_6_high_density_tables.details: Data table with columns: Proprietário, Palhetas, Qualidade (%), Última Data - dense layout confirmed

feature_7_no_functional_regression.details: All 3 modes (Garanhão/Proprietário/Histórico Geral) render data correctly. Histórico Geral sub-options (Inseminações, Transferências Internas, Transferências Externas, Stock Completo) all accessible

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ render_kpi_strip() and safe_pick() helper functions correctly defined within Relatórios block scope
✅ CSS styles for .reports-zone-title, .reports-kpi-strip, .reports-kpi-item properly defined with compact technical styling
✅ st.radio with horizontal=True and label_visibility='collapsed' for clean navigation
✅ st.expander with expanded=False ensures filters start collapsed
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing data (Garanhão: Retoque, Proprietários: Filipe, André)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Relatórios page UX restructuring complete and verified. All 7 features working: 3-zone structure, horizontal radio nav, collapsed filters expander, export at top of results, compact KPIs, high-density tables, no regression in Garanhão/Proprietário/Histórico modes.
